other_observers: Nicole and Kimberly Walbek; yes Tony Leukering observed the bird approximately 1 hour later in the same location
specific_location: East side of Cherry Creek SP, in trees by swim beach. Favored Locust trees.
description: Dendroica Warbler with orange throat fading to white at belly. White from mid-belly to undertail. Black mask, with orange supercilliam. Dark lores and orange crescent below eye. Black streaking in flanks. 2 white wingbars showing no significnt differnce in thickness. Dark back with white braces.Behaviors: Actively feeding on insects.Call: nonePlumage: probable first year male
photographer: Photographer: Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek
